# DenseNeuroVec { #neuroim.DenseNeuroVec }

```python
DenseNeuroVec(data, space, label='')
```

Dense 4D neuroimaging vector.

Dense 4D vector container with voxel-series data attached to a `NeuroSpace`.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type                                           | Description                        | Default    |
|--------|------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------|------------|
| data   | [array](`array`) - [like](`like`)              | 4D array or matrix of voxel values | _required_ |
| space  | [NeuroSpace](`neuroim.neuro_space.NeuroSpace`) | 4D spatial metadata                | _required_ |
| label  | [str](`str`)                                   | Vector label                       | `''`       |

## R Equivalent {.doc-section .doc-section-r-equivalent}

neuroim2::DenseNeuroVec

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [as_matrix](#neuroim.DenseNeuroVec.as_matrix) | Convert to matrix (voxels x time). |
| [as_sparse](#neuroim.DenseNeuroVec.as_sparse) | Convert to sparse representation. |
| [concat](#neuroim.DenseNeuroVec.concat) | Concatenate multiple NeuroVecs along time dimension. |
| [scale_series](#neuroim.DenseNeuroVec.scale_series) | Scale (center and/or normalize) each time series. |
| [series](#neuroim.DenseNeuroVec.series) | Extract time series for voxel(s). |
| [series_3d](#neuroim.DenseNeuroVec.series_3d) | Extract time series for a single voxel using 3D coordinates. |
| [sub_vector](#neuroim.DenseNeuroVec.sub_vector) | Extract subset of volumes. |
| [vectors](#neuroim.DenseNeuroVec.vectors) | Extract per-voxel time series as a list of 1D arrays. |

### as_matrix { #neuroim.DenseNeuroVec.as_matrix }

```python
DenseNeuroVec.as_matrix()
```

Convert to matrix (voxels x time).

#### R Equivalent {.doc-section .doc-section-r-equivalent}

neuroim2::as.matrix

### as_sparse { #neuroim.DenseNeuroVec.as_sparse }

```python
DenseNeuroVec.as_sparse(mask=None)
```

Convert to sparse representation.

### concat { #neuroim.DenseNeuroVec.concat }

```python
DenseNeuroVec.concat(*others)
```

Concatenate multiple NeuroVecs along time dimension.

### scale_series { #neuroim.DenseNeuroVec.scale_series }

```python
DenseNeuroVec.scale_series(center=True, scale=True)
```

Scale (center and/or normalize) each time series.

#### R Equivalent {.doc-section .doc-section-r-equivalent}

neuroim2::scale_series

### series { #neuroim.DenseNeuroVec.series }

```python
DenseNeuroVec.series(x, y=None, z=None)
```

Extract time series for voxel(s).

### series_3d { #neuroim.DenseNeuroVec.series_3d }

```python
DenseNeuroVec.series_3d(x, y, z)
```

Extract time series for a single voxel using 3D coordinates.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type         | Description                     | Default    |
|--------|--------------|---------------------------------|------------|
| x      | [int](`int`) | The 3D coordinates of the voxel | _required_ |
| y      | [int](`int`) | The 3D coordinates of the voxel | _required_ |
| z      | [int](`int`) | The 3D coordinates of the voxel | _required_ |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                                     | Description                         |
|--------|------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------|
|        | [np](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`) | Time series for the specified voxel |

#### R Equivalent {.doc-section .doc-section-r-equivalent}

neuroim2::series(vec, c(x+1, y+1, z+1))  # R uses 1-based indexing

### sub_vector { #neuroim.DenseNeuroVec.sub_vector }

```python
DenseNeuroVec.sub_vector(indices)
```

Extract subset of volumes.

### vectors { #neuroim.DenseNeuroVec.vectors }

```python
DenseNeuroVec.vectors(subset=None)
```

Extract per-voxel time series as a list of 1D arrays.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type                              | Description                                               | Default   |
|--------|-----------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------|-----------|
| subset | [array](`array`) - [like](`like`) | Linear indices of voxels to extract. If None, all voxels. | `None`    |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type               | Description                                |
|--------|--------------------|--------------------------------------------|
|        | list of np.ndarray | List of time series arrays, one per voxel. |
